title: Mate with a Rook
description: Use the box method and king opposition to force the lone king to the edge.

variants.label: Central kings
variants.detail: White: king and rook vs king

solution.pgn:
[SetUp "1"]
[FEN "4k3/8/8/8/R3K3/8/8/8 w - - 0 1"]
[Result "*"]

1. Ra7 Kd8 2. Kd5 Kc8 3. Kd6 Kb8 4. Rc7 Ka8 5. Kc5 Kb8 6. Kb6 Ka8 *
solution.explanation: Cut off the king, walk your king forward, then tighten the box again with Rc7. The line stops at the final mating setup.
